channel.title: Example News
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical and security news for testing.

item.title: Magnitude 5 quake hits border region
item.dc:creator: Alice Reporter
item.description: A magnitude 5 earthquake struck the border region early Monday.

item.title: Election results certified after recount
item.dc:creator: Bob Writer
item.description: Final tallies were certified following a contested recount.

item.title: Markets rally on supply-chain news
item.dc:creator: Carol Analyst
item.description: Equities rose sharply after easing supply-chain pressures.
